concerns.text: The specification requires fitting separate linear regression models (FR-007) but does not include any step to assess the core regression assumptions (linearity, normality of residuals, homoscedasticity, independence). Without diagnostics, the validity of the p‑values and effect‑size estimates cannot be guaranteed.

The expected results state that a "statistically significant negative correlation (p < 0.05, effect size r > 0.3)" would support the hypothesis, yet the success criterion (SC-003) only checks for Bonferroni‑adjusted p < 0.05 and does not enforce the r > 0.3 condition. This leaves the effect‑size claim unvalidated, creating a mismatch between the claimed scientific finding and the validation metric.
